# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

AWSTOE

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-beta.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-alpha.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc.[0-9]+'

jobs:
  release:
    name: Create Release and Publish Packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    permissions:
      contents: write # To create GitHub releases
      packages: write # To publish to GitHub Packages (if used)
      id-token: write # For OIDC authentication with PyPI (trusted publishing)

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Get tag name
        id: get_tag
        run: echo "TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Extract version from tag
        id: extract_version
        run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org' # Required for npm publish
          scope: '@your-org' # Optional: if publishing scoped packages

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Install JavaScript dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build JavaScript package
        run: npm run build # Or `npm build` if configured in package.json

      - name: Publish JavaScript package to npm
        if: success()
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: npm publish --access public # Adjust --access if needed

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: pip install poetry

      - name: Configure Poetry (if using `poetry build`)
        run: poetry config virtualenvs.create false

      - name: Build Python package
        run: poetry build # Or `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`

      - name: Publish Python package to PyPI
        if: success()
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          repository-url: https://upload.pypi.org/legacy/
          # For trusted publishing (recommended):
          # trusted-publisher-id: your-pypi-project
          # trusted-publisher-api-key: your-pypi-api-key-name # Optional: if you have multiple API keys
          # OR for API token:
          password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }}

      - name: Generate release notes (optional, customize as needed)
        id: generate_release_notes
        run: |
          echo "### What's Changed" > release_notes.md
          git log --pretty=format:"- %s by @%an" ${{ github.event.before }}..${{ github.sha }} >> release_notes.md
          echo "" >> release_notes.md
          echo "Full Changelog: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/${{ github.event.before }}...${{ github.ref_name }}" >> release_notes.md
          echo "RELEASE_BODY=$(cat release_notes.md)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ steps.get_tag.outputs.TAG }}
          name: Release ${{ steps.get_tag.outputs.TAG }}
          body: ${{ steps.generate_release_notes.outputs.RELEASE_BODY }} # Or a static message/description
          draft: false
          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.get_tag.outputs.TAG, '-') }} # True if tag contains hyphen (e.g., -alpha, -beta, -rc)
          files: |
            ./dist/*.tgz # Example: Attach npm package artifact
            ./dist/*.whl # Example: Attach Python wheel
            ./dist/*.tar.gz # Example: Attach Python sdist
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
